title: Thrips-Lure - monitor thrips in low population
subtitle: Thrips-Lure - surveiller les thrips à faible population
description: A practice abstract detailing the Thrips-Lure, a controlled-release dispenser for attracting and monitoring thrips populations using blue or yellow sticky cards. It provides deployment guidelines and efficacy data demonstrating increased capture rates for early detection and population suppression in vegetable crops and greenhouses.
